title: fix: restore rotated Azure inference key
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Updates the encrypted Azure East US inference credential in dev, staging, and production.
- Restores the valid key that was previously deployed from an unmerged branch and later overwritten by a `main` deployment.
- Fixes Azure 401 failures affecting `openai`, `openai-fast`, `gpt-5.6-luna`, and other East US routes.

Validation:
- Decrypted values match the validated rotation commit in all three environments.
- The production credential returns HTTP 200 from Azure; the previous credential returns HTTP 401.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passes.

gist.headline: The Azure flowers bloom again
gist.blurb: A rotated Azure key found its way back into the hive. East US text routes are once again answering with words instead of 401s.
gist.summary: Restored the validated rotated Azure East US inference credential across dev, staging, and production, returning HTTP 200 service for openai, openai-fast, gpt-5.6-luna, and other affected routes.
gist.impact: Users can again use Azure East US-backed models including openai, openai-fast, and gpt-5.6-luna without the previous 401 authentication failures.
gist.visual_concept: Polli tends a cozy garden of retro terminal flowers labeled openai, openai-fast, and gpt-5.6-luna, while a restored key-shaped watering can brings the drooping code-plants back to life. A small CRT monitor robot shows a cheerful green "200 OK" screen, representing recovered Azure East US inference routes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny mechanic tool belt, using a golden key-shaped watering can to revive code-plants beside retro terminals labeled "openai" and "gpt-5.6-luna"; a friendly CRT monitor robot displays "200 OK" in chunky pixel text. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint-lavender-cream gradient background, flowers and vines, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
